_note: Hand-edit THIS file (sector membership + one-line theses); 00_INDEX.md is a DERIVED artifact rebuilt by _tools/build_index.py (wired into refresh_features.py). Pages not listed here are auto-flagged in an 'Unclassified' section rather than dropped.

entries.thesis: Full-stack AI-factory platform at +85% rev; debate is demand sustainability vs ASIC erosion.
#1 custom-ASIC/TPU partner; binary setup on the ">$100B" FY27 guide vs $250-300B FY28 (JPM).
AI-infra long with a server-CPU leg; risk concentrated in MI450 execution.
Sole-source leading-edge foundry (~70% share); pricing headroom vs overseas-fab dilution.
Supply-chain chokepoint (EUV near-monopoly); Street "behind the curve" on 2027/28 vs a 2028 DRAM air-pocket.
Pure-play on AI memory intensity (HBM sold-out CY26); debate = peak earnings vs run-rate.
#2 merchant custom-ASIC (Trainium/Maia) + optical DSP; debate = hyperscaler concentration + 1.6T share.
Most direct InP-substrate bottleneck play (~80% non-China w/ Sumitomo); bull = optical supply oligopoly, bear = China-permit gate + trading-vehicle beta.
Specialty foundry re-rating on SiPho/SiGe optical; $1.3B 2027 SiPho commit (NVDA-anchored per FinTwit); bear = ramp/concentration. SIG Positive $330.
Pre-revenue EOI/CPO optionality de-risked by $50M Lumilens order; bear = valuation vs FOCI + CPO timeline slip. Thin coverage.
Binary IDM turnaround; 18A yielding, but the equity is a call option on the first big external foundry customer.
#1 power/auto-semi IDM; cyclical recovery + 800V AI-datacenter-power ramp (NVIDIA anchor); bear = DC-power share loss.
China's national-champion mature-node foundry; self-sufficiency proxy vs mature-node price-war + EUV/export-control ceiling on its DUV 7nm push.
World's largest mobile-SoC vendor pivoting into a data-center custom-ASIC house (Google TPU v8t/v9/v10 roadmap); JPM sees DC ~30% of rev 2027 → ~60% 2028; GS PT NT$6,800. TWD, no SEC.
AI ARR >$37B/+123%; swing is capex (CY27 ~$276B) vs Azure revenue + OpenAI concentration.
AWS re-acceleration (+28%) + in-house silicon (Trainium); debate = $200B capex/ROIC.
Full-stack compounder (Search +19%, Cloud +63%); debate is valuation, not fundamentals.
Fastest grower in Mag7 ex-GPU; bear = capital intensity and negative incremental ROIC.
Turned into an AI-infra hyperscaler (RPO $638B/+363%); bear = dot-com-peak capex/sales + dilution.
Beat-and-raise (cRPO +21%) + agentic pivot to consumption; on-disk transcripts are paraphrased (fidelity).
Private frontier lab (Claude); enterprise/coding leadership + Amazon/Google compute; ~$40B+ ARR. No public financials.
Private frontier lab (ChatGPT/GPT); scale + distribution vs cash burn + sub-50% share; Microsoft-anchored. No public financials.
Broadest-line front-end WFE; share-gainer into a $200B/$250B '27-'28 WFE cycle; bear = memory beta + crowded positioning.
Process-control near-monopoly (~7x peers); only semicap to guide CY27 WFE > CY26; back-half-of-cycle revision story.
Cleanest back-end proxy for AI test intensity (~70% AI); bear = ~2-customer concentration + H1-weighted book.
Specialty process equipment (LSA / ion-beam / MBE / MOCVD); now an Axcelis all-stock merger-arb / ACLS proxy.
Near-monopoly compound-semi MOCVD (~100% InP, >85% GaN); AI-optical inflection (Jefferies Buy €73); thin internal coverage.
Etch/deposition WFE — completes the AMAT/KLAC/LRCX trio; most memory-capex-levered (NAND/HBM).
Broadest-line Japanese WFE (coater/developer ~91% share, dielectric etch >50%); cleanest Japan-listed proxy for leading-edge WFE + HBM packaging. ¥, FYE March.
#1 ATE in a duopoly with Teradyne; ~80% of SoC test is HPC/AI and effectively sole SoC tester at the GPU/CoWoS leaders — levered to test intensity, not wafer starts. ¥.
Near-monopoly precision dicing/grinding/polishing (~70-80% share of HBM wafer-thinning tools) + consumables; sixth straight record year on AI GPU/HBM. ¥, FYE March.
Hybrid-bonding / TCB leader for HBM and 2.5D/3D stacking (AI ~50% of 2025 orders, GM 63-66%); AMAT hardware partner on the high-end HB roadmap.
Cheapest way to own the memory super-cycle; HBM4 catch-up vs SK Hynix + foundry optionality. ₩, no SEC.
#1 HBM, NVDA's primary supplier, sold out through 2026; bear = HBM4 commoditization. ₩, no SEC.
Cleanest listed NAND/SSD-cycle proxy; no DRAM/HBM offset on the downturn. ¥, no SEC, IPO'd 2024.
Post-spin pure-play NAND on AI storage; price-driven blowout + $42B LTA backlog vs blowoff-top risk.
Pure-HDD post-SanDisk-spin; nearline exabyte growth + HAMR; the "1B" to Seagate's "1A".
HAMR/Mozaic front-runner in a supply-constrained nearline cycle; pricing escalators into CY27/28.
Highest-quality large-cap analog; industrial recovery + datacenter-power (Empower); crowded/premium.
Crowded analog long; 300mm capex→FCF inflection + 800V DC-power share; valuation the bear (GS Sell).
High-FCF handset franchise eroding (Apple modem); re-rating hinges on auto/IoT/PC diversification.
Upstream IP toll on every SoC; ARMv9/CSS royalty + >$100B server-CPU TAM; own-silicon pivot the risk. 20-F filer.
Highest auto-beta analog/embedded; content-per-vehicle + datacenter doubling; concentration the risk.
Textbook deep-cyclical MCU/analog recovery; GM 54%→62%; supply-gated, already re-rated.
Bottoming auto/SiC power IDM + AI-DC-power (800V) kicker; share not TAM (Citi Neutral vs TXN).
Best-positioned merchant AI-Ethernet name; risk = 2H26 backlog drawdown + rich multiple.
Optical/DCI leader; demand outruns supply, debate purely valuation (~85x NTM).
InP chokepoint in AI interconnect; NVIDIA stake + CPO deal; bear is relative vs LITE.
US photonics pure-play (rev +90%); demand isn't the question, supply/execution is.
Volatile small-cap with in-house InP fab; 2027 projection trading on FinTwit conviction.
Re-rate to AI-infra (Optical +36%, Meta/Nvidia LTAs); bear = valuation + CPO payoff 2028+.
Incumbent re-rating to AI-infra (orders +35%); bear prefers ANET, flags pull-forward.
AI-connectivity pure-play — active-copper (AEC) + SerDes/optical DSP; ~68% GM, hyperscaler-concentrated.
Scale-up connectivity (PCIe/CXL retimers + Scorpio fabric); >$1k content/accelerator; concentration + rich multiple.
Owns what the AI-power cycle is short: 24/7 carbon-free nuclear; risk is PPA timing.
Largest US merchant power turning into an AI-power play; debate is pace, not direction.
PJM merchant IPP (Susquehanna nuclear + AWS PPA); risk = concentration + co-location regulation.
Cleanest AI-power earnings-revisions story (orders +71%); bear = order peak + Wind.
Labor pick-and-shovel on the grid/data-center super-cycle (backlog $48.5B).
Gas-midstream compounder (Transco + Power Innovation); debate = valuation + PI earnings quality.
EPC pure-play on the firm-power super-cycle (backlog ~79% gas); nil coverage on disk.
"AI-factory power" electrical name (switchgear/busway); RMT sharpens portfolio; bull = capex/800V, bear = Q1 margin trim.
On-site SOFC fuel cells for DC power (Nebius/Google); bull = grid bottleneck, bear = Redburn Sell + Delta/Ceres competition.
AI-interconnect compounder; 800V busbar/connector content + CommScope optical; debate = copper terminal value.
TE Connectivity — connector power/signal AI-DC content (AI rev →~$2.4bn FY26); auto-mix the drag.
nVent — AI-DC power + liquid cooling (DC ~$1B, backlog $2.6B); NVIDIA CDU partner; order lumpiness.
Vertiv — cleanest AI-DC power+cooling proxy; co-designs NVIDIA 800VDC; $15B backlog; order opacity.
EMS re-rating to AI-DC power (Anord Mardix) + JetCool cooling; CPI spin Q1-CY27; margin-dilutive near-term.
Wolfspeed — post-Ch11 SiC; 800V datacenter call-option but negative GM + restructuring overhang.
Navitas — GaN/SiC; binary on the NVIDIA 800V design win (rev 2027); cash burn + small-cap volatility.
Power-conversion ICs; FinTwit NVDA 800VDC "main stages" partner, but no capital catalyst + consumer drag. Thin coverage.
Power MOSFET/IC small-cap in the 800VDC Rubin-rack basket; design-win unconfirmed, negative EPS. Thin coverage.
Cybersecurity platformization land-grab + agentic SecOps; debate = organic vs M&A-flattered NGS ARR.
Falcon consolidation flywheel + Charlotte AI; net-new ARR re-accel; valuation/crowding + 2024-outage tail the bear.
Agentforce $0→$1B+ ARR is the AI-monetization test case; bear = ~10-13% growth + SaaS-seat-reset (BofA UW $160).
Dual engine: ads + AI data-licensing; binary on Google AI-Overviews referral-traffic cannibalization.
Commerce OS at 30%+ GMV; agentic-commerce binary (TAM-expander vs LLM-storefront disintermediation).
Ontology/"action engine" moat (claimed 5-yr); momentum strong but valuation split (UBS Buy $200 vs DB Hold $200).
AXON AI ad engine; eCommerce inflection + fading META threat the bull, drawn-out eComm ramp the bear (DB Buy $660 / GS Neutral $585).
Life-sciences cloud; Vault CRM migration vs AI-disclosure overhang until Q4 Investor Day (MS EW $215).
Cloudflare — developer/edge platform + Zero Trust security, AI-inference-at-edge (Workers AI); +34% rev, "agentic-AI-first" ~20% RIF; bull = platform/RPO compounding, bear = valuation + GM mix-down.
Akamai — legacy CDN delivery (declining) pivoting to Security + Cloud Compute; $1.8B 7-yr frontier-model infra deal re-accelerates growth to double-digits 2027 (BofA upgrade Buy $175).
Fastly — edge-delivery turnaround diversifying into Security + Compute (Sec +47%); first profitable year; bear = customer concentration (TikTok/top-10) + Cloudflare/hyperscaler competition.
AI-server integration winner ($53B backlog, $60B FY27 guide); bear = thin AI-server margins + pull-forward.
Multi-segment beat + Juniper synergies; durability debate (GS bull $79 vs MS/Bernstein EW).
Fastest NVIDIA rack integrator + DLC leader; thin assembly margin + governance overhang (Hold).
Highest-visibility GPU neocloud ($99B backlog) but ~$25B high-coupon debt + customer concentration.
EMS re-rating via ZT Systems AMD-rack integration (FY27 $16B+, ~2x FY25); bear = ZT margin/pull-forward (JPM/BofA/SIG all Neutral).
Highest-octane listed neocloud (ARR→$7-9B, NVDA stake); capex burn + circular-financing scrutiny.
Wafer-scale fast-inference vs NVDA; OpenAI take-or-pay; UAE concentration. Recent IPO, no public consensus.
IPO'd Jun-2026 (~$75bn, largest ever); Starlink + Launch + AI (ex-xAI: Grok/X/COLOSSUS ~1GW, ~325k GPUs). FY25 rev $17.2bn, net loss ~$(4.9)bn; Musk ~82% vote. Read-through to NVDA/CRDO.
Strong franchise + memory-dislocation advantage; bear = AI catch-up + price elasticity.
Clean organic algorithm (12-14% rev, 31.5% margin); near-term setup is a catalyst vacuum.
World's #1 OTA; binary debate on agentic LLMs (TAM expander vs disintermediation).
Winner-take-most demand aggregator (~$10B FCF); everything hinges on the AV binary.
High-quality audio compounder; debate = AI-music monetization (Remix) vs <2% rev 2030.
HEV volume leader generating cash; margin compressed 3 years by tariffs/FX; thin coverage.
Rotating from EV volume to autonomy/robotics re-rate (FSD, Optimus, Terafab); MS EW $415, JPM just to Neutral.
Only scaled ex-China rare-earth/magnet play; de-China "follow the gigawatt" bull vs trade-deal/execution risk (BofA Buy). Thin coverage.
EDA duopoly (with SNPS) + hardware emulation; ~80% recurring, AI-design tailwind; bear = China/export-control exposure + rich multiple.
#1 EDA franchise + Design IP, now multiphysics via the ~$35B Ansys deal; AI-design secular grower; bear = Ansys integration/leverage + China.
